modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about heating status on USD campus

full_description_text:
- User asked if heat has been turned off for the year.  
- They also wanted to know when it will be activated in the fall.  
- This was during a live chat with the help desk.
